// Example source map structure
{
  "version": 3,
  "file": "app.min.js",
  "sources": [
    "../src/utils/format.js",
    "../src/components/Cart.jsx",
    "../src/hooks/useCart.js"
  ],
  "sourcesContent": [
    "// Original source of format.js...",
    "// Original source of Cart.jsx...",
    "// Original source of useCart.js..."
  ],
  "names": [
    "calculateTotalPrice",
    "items",
    "taxRate",
    "subtotal"
  ],
  "mappings": "AAAA,SAASA,EAAqBC,EAAOC,GAC..."
}

// The minified file references its source map via a comment:
//# sourceMappingURL=app.min.js.map

// Or via HTTP header (preferred for security):
// SourceMap: /maps/app.min.js.map
